projectDescription: A lightweight, multithreaded Python CLI tool that scans a target host for open TCP ports with configurable rate limiting and results export to JSON, CSV, or plain text.
keyFeatures: Multithreaded TCP port scanning for fast results
Configurable port range (start and end port)
Rate limiting to avoid overwhelming target hosts
Service name resolution for common ports
Export results to JSON, CSV, or plain text
No external dependencies — standard library only
publicApiSurface: target (positional argument) — target IP address or hostname
